title: Twilight Forest Villages
description: Adds villages to the twilight forest dimension, ((it is the exact same mod as "Twilight Forest - Dungeons & Villages" only without the dungeons!!))
body:
# Twilight Forest - ~~Dungeons~~ & Villages

!! This is a copy of the mod [Dungeons & Villages](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twilight-forest-dungeons-villages) but with the dungeons removed and only villages remain, you cannot install both mods at the same time, if you want dungeons as well as villages install [Dungeons & Villages](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/twilight-forest-dungeons-villages) instead !!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c50f1461c986b912e57904acff886b104a1336a_0.webp)

## Description

Adds new content to The Twilight Forest mod.

*   Villages now spawn in the twilight forest.
*   5 new professions with new trades blocks and items.
*   New miner trader mob will spawn near you once in a while.
*   ~~Dungeons spawn underground.~~

### New decoration blocks

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae3614fea51618bf60d42c2168d8b193cbf432c2.png)

### New trader mob

Many new trades

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36836bf3c95c028d9ccb51b86eeb2a899820f498_0.webp)

## Dependencies

*   You will need twilight forest of the same version installed.
*   [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
